headline: Sysco Corporation Raises Dividend, Reinforces Growth Strategy
summary: SYY raises its dividend to 55 cents, signaling confidence in cash flow strength and steady growth.

headline: Philip Morris' IQOS Retains FDA Modified-Risk Authorization
summary: Philip Morris wins renewed FDA backing for IQOS, keeping its modified-risk claims alive as the company accelerates its shift beyond cigarettes.

headline: US Justice Department criminally investigating beef companies, WSJ reports
summary: The U.S. Department of Justice'santitrust division is criminally investigating the conduct oflarge meatpackers, the Wall Street Journal said on Monday,citing people familiar with the matter. ...
